name: Cheese Torte and Fresh Fruit
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Camembert cheese, cut into small cubes
8 Granny Smith apples, sliced and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. Let Camembert, Swiss, and blue cheese stand at room temperature for one hour.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the Camembert, Swiss, and blue cheese with 2 packages of cream cheese; set aside.
3. Line a 9-inch pie plate with foil.
4. Stir the milk and sour cream into the remaining cream cheese and spread in the pie plate on top of the foil.
5. Sprinkle pecans atop the cheese layer.
6. Press the nuts in.
7. Spoon the Camembert, Swiss, and blue cheese mixture atop the nuts and cream cheese layer, spreading to the plate edges.
8. Place plastic wrap over the cheese and cover tightly.
9. Refrigerate for 2-3 days before serving. The flavor is better if kept up to a week.
10. To serve, remove the wrap, turn onto a plate, peel off the foil, sprinkle with parsley, and serve with apple slices.
